overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking along a scenic countryside dirt path. The journey traverses wildflower meadows, passes stone walls and a rural farmhouse, and approaches a lakeside view with ancient oak trees on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: countryside dirt path through wildflower meadows with mountain backdrop

events.description: encountering and passing a villager NPC walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through meadows with distant mountains ahead

notable_agents.action: villager in orange clothing walking past the camera character on the path

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the countryside
large blue mountain range visible on the horizon
low stone wall running parallel to the path
large grey boulder beside the path
fields of green grass with purple and red wildflowers
rustic wooden fence posts in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a wide dirt path through open meadows filled with wildflowers. A villager in orange clothing approaches from the opposite direction and passes by on the right. Low stone walls and wooden fences line the left side of the path, while distant mountains rise against a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with stone wall boundaries approaching a farmhouse

events.description: rural farmhouse becomes visible on the right hillside

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as stone walls appear on both sides and a farmhouse comes into view

entered.detail: traditional wooden farmhouse with dark roof on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The path continues toward a traditional wooden farmhouse perched on the right hillside. Stone walls now flank both sides of the trail, creating a more enclosed feeling. The distant mountains shift to the left as the camera progresses forward, and the wildflower meadows give way to more structured grassy areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone-walled country lane transitioning to open meadow with path junction

events.description: exiting the stone wall corridor into open meadow area
approaching a path junction and continuing straight on the main trail

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone corridor and emerging into an open area with a path split ahead

entered.detail: dirt path splitting into two directions ahead
dilapidated wooden structure with broken roof on the right

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between tall stone walls on both sides before opening into a grassy clearing. A junction appears ahead where the path splits, and the camera continues straight past old wooden ruins on the right. The stone walls recede into the distance as the terrain becomes more open.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside meadow path with ancient oak trees

events.description: lake becomes visible through the trees on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking toward the lakeside view past ancient oak trees and wildflower fields

entered.detail: blue lake water visible through the trees in the distance
large mature oak tree with spreading branches beside the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide meadow with scattered ancient oak trees. A stone wall reappears on the left near a scenic lakeside view that becomes visible through the trees. The path continues through fields of wildflowers toward the water, with the distant mountains still visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that transitions from open, wildflower-filled meadows into a more enclosed approach toward a hillside farmhouse. It begins with Geralt walking through expansive fields under a bright blue sky, passing a villager in orange clothing who moves in the opposite direction. As the camera progresses, the wide meadows gradually give way to structured grassy areas, and the distant mountains shift toward the left of the frame. The scene then narrows as stone walls begin to flank both sides of the trail, creating a sense of enclosure before the path leads directly toward a traditional wooden farmhouse perched on the right hillside.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone corridor that gradually expands into a wide, sunlit lakeside meadow. It begins as the path narrows between tall stone walls on both sides before opening into a grassy clearing. As the camera continues straight past old wooden ruins, the stone walls recede into the distance and the terrain becomes increasingly open. The scene then shifts into a wide meadow scattered with ancient oak trees, where a final stone wall appears on the left. Finally, the path leads through fields of wildflowers toward a scenic lakeside view with distant mountains visible on the horizon.
